subject: A stern, heavyset older man with a square jaw, heavy brow, and intense downward gaze — close-up portrait in an anime art style with vivid energy radiating behind him
description: The image is a close-up portrait of a stocky older man rendered in anime style. He has a broad, square-jawed face, a heavy brow set in a scowl, small eyes fixed in a serious downward gaze, and sparse short hair with a small patch of facial stubble. His expression conveys focused intensity or barely-contained aggression. Behind him, bright magenta-pink energy or aura radiates outward, creating a dramatic backlit effect. The color contrast between the dark earth-toned face and the vivid pink energy field is the dominant visual tension. A SAMPLE watermark is printed across the image. No weapons are visible; the figure's hands are not shown.
foreground: Close-up face of a stern older man
background: Bright magenta-pink energy aura radiating outward
emotion: intense scowl, focused aggression, serious mode
